fileContext.overview: OpenAICompatProvider is an LLM provider that connects to a remote server that exposes the OpenAI /v1/chat/completions API.

symbols.name: OpenAICompatProvider
symbols.purpose: LLM provider for remote OpenAI-compatible server
symbols.behavior: Handles API requests and responses to provide LLM functionality
symbols.limitations: Requires OpenAI-compatible server URL and model name

symbols.name: complete
symbols.purpose: Completes a conversation with the LLM
symbols.behavior: Sends a request to the OpenAI API and returns the response
symbols.limitations: May throw errors if API request fails
